div.p: Key Insight: Undo's old_value (before-image) is only correct if the page currently has the new_value (after-image). Without redoing uncommitted changes, memory state ≠ disk state, and undo applies the wrong inverse.

text.tspan: // Steal: page P flushed to disk
// Steal: page P flushed to disk
// Disk had B, we write A
// Disk had B, we write A
// Steal: page P flushed to disk
// Steal: page P flushed to disk
